description_long: This object is a potted plant featuring several large, vibrant red flowers with prominent central stamens. The flowers are supported by slender green stems and surrounded by lush, green, pinnately compound leaves. The petals are broad, slightly overlapping, and arranged in a somewhat radial pattern, giving the blooms a full and open appearance. The plant is housed in a dark brown, semi-opaque pot that appears to be made of plastic. The overall look is decorative and well-suited for placement on sidewalks, in parks, or near building entrances in urban environments. The combination of bold red flowers and bright green foliage creates a striking visual contrast.
description: A decorative potted plant with large red flowers and green compound leaves in a dark brown pot. The flowers are open and vibrant, making it ideal for urban decorative use.
description_view_0: Front view shows three prominent red flowers facing forward, with green leaves fanning out around the base and sides of the dark brown pot.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the overlapping petals of the flowers and the spread of the green leaves, with the flowers slightly angled to the left.
description_view_2: The flowers are seen from a side angle, revealing the depth of the arrangement and the way the leaves extend outward from the pot.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the rear and side petals, with the leaves appearing more prominent and the flowers slightly turned away.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial pattern, with each flower displaying five broad, slightly overlapping petals radiating symmetrically from the center. The arrangement is whorled, giving the blooms a full, open appearance.
